userDefinedField.fieldValue: MW id 7 Not possible to have xccy with amortization in Markitwire
MW id 4 Not possible in VCON to have Amortizing deals
MW id 7 CSTM _DEAL OR mutual break status or clearing decision as Yes
Pay 5.2151% on fixed leg 16,000,000 Receive JPY LIBOR 3M on floating leg 1,899,430K Expiry 29 jun 2019
EMIR Eligible.Does not Require Mandatory Clearing.Trade cannot be cleared.
MW id 3 Not possible in MW to specify an interpolated upfront stub with customized first fixng
MW id 7 Not possible to have xccy with amortization in Markitwire
MW id 8 Start date can't be different per leg in Markitwire
MW id 4 Not possible in VCON to have Amortizing deals
MW id 7 CSTM _DEAL OR mutual break status or clearing decision as Yes
Pay 5.2151% on fixed leg 16,000,000 Receive JPY LIBOR 3M on floating leg 1,899,430K Expiry 29 jun 2017
EMIR Eligible.Does not Require Mandatory Clearing.Trade cannot be cleared.
